data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the source status snapshot on the canonical row, but the evidence provided does not include any details about operational assignment rows or their source pointers. The linked use case mentions the need for these rows, but there is no evidence that they exist or are being tracked in the current saga run. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of canonical operational assignment rows with source pointers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
